mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students( name, kana_name, nick_name, email, area, age, sex, remark, is_deleted ) VALUES( #{name}, #{kanaName}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{area}, #{age}, #{sex}, #{remark}, false )
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET name = #{name}, kana_name = #{kanaName}, nick_name = #{nickName}, email = #{email}, area = #{area}, age = #{age}, sex = #{sex}, remark = #{remark}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
